section.heading: Authority to agree to amendments to Articles of Agreement
section.chapeau: The United States Governor of the Corporation is authorized to agree to amendments to the Articles of Agreement of the Corporation that would—

paragraph.content: amend Article II, Section 2(c)(ii), to increase the vote by which the Board of Governors of the Corporation may increase the capital stock of the Corporation from a three-fourths majority to a four-fifths majority; and

amend Article VII(a) to increase the vote by which the Board of Governors of the Corporation may amend the Articles of Agreement of the Corporation from a four-fifths majority to an eighty-five percent majority.
